feedback.text: I believe it's important to regulate digital and subscription style services. An obvious example would be cars, I don't want my engine to stop working due to my subscription ending. Also I believe that digital goods aquisition must be very transparent. If a digital product is bought (non-subscriptyion), then loss of access should have some backup plan/recompensation/etc..., This conversation is very important, as the world IS digital. We cannot afford to fall behind on this.
